poitp.name: Point of Interest Teleporter
poitp.destinationInstallRelease: Destination not in your World. Install Beneos Battlemaps Release {release}.
poitp.destinationInstallEscalia: Destination not in your World. Install Beneos Custom World Map: Escalia.
poitp.audit.title: POI Teleporter Audit
poitp.audit.hint: Scans all scenes for broken Point of Interest links and identifies missing releases.
poitp.audit.empty: No broken POIs found. Everything looks good!
poitp.audit.invalidTarget: POI has no valid target reference
poitp.audit.cacheTargetNameHint: If enabled, the audit tool stores the target's name in the note's flags to remember it even if the target journal is later deleted/missing.
